title: onosma sinica var. farreri
intro: Onosma sinica var. farreri, also known as Farrer's onosma, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce apoptosis in cancer cells and inhibit the growth of tumors. The plant's health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-cancer properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. In traditional Chinese medicine, Onosma sinica var. farreri is commonly prepared as a decoction or capsule, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems.
